column33: This sheet uses the math from the forum thread "DPS'n Advice", which is complex and highly context-dependent. In particular for dual wield, you must enter character stats without the main or off-hand weapon stats, separately, for the DPS calculations of each to be correct. Once you know the best main/off-hand weapon for each hand, you can add their DPS numbers up.
